headline: Verizon Frontier Deal Recasts Fiber Scale Valuation And Investor Focus
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has agreed to acquire Frontier Communications, aiming to expand its fiber network footprint and bundled connectivity offerings. The deal is expected to reshape Verizon's business model by adding fixed line and fiber scale to its traditional wireless operations. Management is positioning the transaction as a way to address wireless growth pressures, support ARPA, and reduce customer churn over time. Verizon Communications, trading at $50.31, has returned...

headline: 3 Dividend Stocks With Robust Yields For Tough Times
summary: In a volatile market, dividend stocks are a safe bet for income-minded investors. AI stocks are struggling, making dividend stocks a good alternative. Three top dividend stock picks for stability and growth are General Mills, Chevron, and Verizon.

headline: Deutsche Telekom: Why The Recent Surge Is Unlikely To Last
summary: Deutsche Telekom (DTEGY) delivers strong operational results but trades above my $30/share PT, justifying a 'Hold' rating.

headline: Goldman Sachs, Citi Raise Verizon (VZ) Targets, Highlight Shift to EBITDA and Cash Flow Focus
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio for Income: 15 Stocks to Invest In. On March 25, Goldman Sachs analyst Michael Ng raised the price recommendation on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) to $55 from $50. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares.
